questions: What merge conflicts exist in the helix-cli repo and how should they be resolved?

answers.answer: One file had merge conflicts: src/tickets/index.ts with two conflict regions. Conflict 1 was in the ticketsUsage() function text — the ticket branch used <ticket-ref> terminology with exitCode param while staging added [--run <runId>] to the artifacts command. Conflict 2 was in the 'artifacts' switch case — the ticket branch added help handling and extractTicketRef/resolveTicket, while staging passed rest args to cmdTicketsArtifacts for --run support. Both conflicts were resolved by preserving both intents: ticket branch's resolver pattern and help handling combined with staging's --run option and rest parameter passthrough.
evidence: src/tickets/index.ts conflict markers at lines 21-37 and 107-118
.helix/merge-conflicts.json listing src/tickets/index.ts as the only conflicted file
cmdTicketsArtifacts signature in src/tickets/artifacts.ts accepts (config, ticketId, args) — confirming rest parameter is expected

statement: Resolved all merge conflicts in src/tickets/index.ts by combining the ticket branch's ticket-ref resolution pattern (extractTicketRef + resolveTicket + isHelpRequested) with the staging branch's --run flag support (rest parameter passthrough to cmdTicketsArtifacts and [--run <runId>] in usage text). TypeScript compilation passes cleanly.
